Setup
FrunkUke chose tails for the opening coin flip.
BananaHammer33 won the coin toss.
BananaHammer33 decided to go second.
FrunkUke drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
   • (me1_131) Ultra Ball, (me1_131) Ultra Ball, (mee_1) Basic Grass Energy, (me3_62) Meowth ex, (sv7_131) Area Zero Underdepths, (sv5_123) Raging Bolt ex, (sv6_25) Teal Mask Ogerpon ex
BananaHammer33 drew 7 cards for the opening hand.
- 7 drawn cards.
FrunkUke played (sv5_123) Raging Bolt ex to the Active Spot.
BananaHammer33 played (sv8-5_4) Budew to the Active Spot.

FrunkUke's Turn
FrunkUke drew (me1_115) Energy Switch.
FrunkUke played (sv6_25) Teal Mask Ogerpon ex to the Bench.
FrunkUke's (sv6_25) Teal Mask Ogerpon ex used Teal Dance.
- FrunkUke attached (mee_1) Basic Grass Energy to (sv6_25) Teal Mask Ogerpon ex on the Bench.
- FrunkUke drew (mee_3) Basic Water Energy.
FrunkUke played (me1_131) Ultra Ball.
- FrunkUke discarded 2 cards.
   • (me1_115) Energy Switch, (sv7_131) Area Zero Underdepths
- FrunkUke drew (sv6_64) Wellspring Mask Ogerpon ex.
- FrunkUke shuffled their deck.
FrunkUke played (sv6_64) Wellspring Mask Ogerpon ex to the Bench.
FrunkUke attached (mee_3) Basic Water Energy to (sv6_64) Wellspring Mask Ogerpon ex on the Bench.
FrunkUke ended their turn.
